mapper.select:
SELECT id, dept_name, dept_code, description, location, phone, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time FROM department WHERE status = 1
AND dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, dept_name, dept_code, description, location, phone, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time FROM department WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department (dept_name, dept_code, description, location, phone, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{deptName}, #{deptCode}, #{description}, #{location}, #{phone}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE department SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
